visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). A Black creator is seated FROM BEHIND at a premium coding workstation, calm and focused, wearing a black hoodie with a large number 8 on the back (no face reveal). Multiple monitors show code and a subtle line graph; a laptop with code; a warm desk lamp; a coffee/tea mug with steam; plants and hanging vines; books on system design, clean code, and algorithms; West African-inspired pottery and design objects; a warm wood desk; and a blank blue neon sign panel on the wall (an unlit, lettering-free glowing panel - do NOT render any text or letters; branding is composited in afterward). Through a large window is a futuristic African city skyline at the deepest pre-dawn hour - indigo-black sky overhead with a thin line of warm amber gold rising at the horizon, stars still faintly visible, city towers glowing with electric-blue and neon cyan light below, the first golden warmth just beginning to touch the highest skyline spires. Cosmic Focus art style: orbit-like UI ring shapes barely visible as window reflections at very low opacity, deep-space navy upper sky, warm amber horizon glow building upward. Inside the room the desk lamp glows warmly against the pre-dawn cool. Thumbnail-like hero framing - premium, scroll-stopping, atmospheric pre-dawn morning energy. Afrofuturist city view, warm desk lamp, calm study atmosphere, culturally intentional objects, futuristic but grounded, balanced electric-blue and warm gold lighting. High-quality anime illustration, cinematic lighting, clean composition, no extra people, no copyrighted characters. Leave the lower third of the frame as clean, uncluttered dark space for the composited headline. Avoid generic startup office, bright corporate lighting, cheap gamer RGB, cluttered composition, cartoon props, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, random neon colors, copyrighted franchise references, garbled screen text, random figurines, tripod-mounted monitors, makeshift setups, rendered text, signage lettering, and garbled typography. avoid photorealism, empty minimal rooms, sparse composition

Atmosphere is peaceful, low-stimulation, overnight, meditative - a long-watch-time loop. visual.headline: LATE NIGHT CODING RADIO

reel.sora_prompt: A calm cinematic lo-fi loop of an anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio at the deepest hour of midnight. The scene is dark and still - a very gentle slow push-in from behind the creator toward the monitors. The soft amber desk lamp casts a warm circle on the wood desk surface. Thin wisps of steam curl lazily from the mug and dissolve upward. One monitor glows faintly with low-brightness code. The futuristic African city skyline through the large window pulses gently with distant soft city lights - a few slow-drifting vehicles move silently between towers far below. Motion is minimal and hypnotic: steam drift, distant vehicle lights crawling slowly, the gradual camera push. Low contrast, deep midnight calm, deeply peaceful overnight energy. No on-screen text or rendered lettering. Sora adds its own gentle ambient audio - output stays clean.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a minimal cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired abstract composition for Layer8Culture Radio - a premium quote card, not a detailed scene (not photorealistic). Deep Black (#030508) and Midnight Navy (#07111F) fill almost the entire frame. In the far softened background at very low opacity: a dim warm desk lamp glow bleeds warmth from one corner; a faint electric-blue monitor shimmer traces the edge of a desk surface; the blurred impressionistic suggestion of a large window with the soft distant glow of a sleeping city beyond - all extremely painterly and almost invisible. The composition reads as a room at rest - premium, inviting, spatial. The lower two-thirds of the frame are a clean near-black negative space for the large bold composited headline. Subtle thin waveform arcs and very faint circuit-line details near the upper frame edges at minimal opacity. High-end music-label quote card feel - dark, editorial, saveable, shareable. High-quality anime illustration style, extremely minimal and atmospheric. Avoid clutter, cartoon props, bright lighting, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, random neon colors, copyrighted franchise references, garbled screen text, rendered text, signage lettering, and garbled typography. avoid photorealism, empty minimal rooms, sparse composition
